name: Animation Tests
description: Tests for all primitives with all animation types, controlled by a boolean property

createPrimitive.script: (type, x, y) => { const el = document.querySelector(`[data-testid="palette-element-${type}"]`); const canvas = document.querySelector('[data-testid="designer-canvas-container"]'); const canvasRect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', JSON.stringify({type})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragstart', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragover', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + x, clientY: canvasRect.top + y})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('drop', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + x, clientY: canvasRect.top + y})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragend', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); return true; }

tests.name: TC001: Create symbol with boolean property for animation control
tests.description: Create a new symbol and add an 'animationsEnabled' boolean property

tests.name: TC002: Rectangle with Spin animation
tests.description: Create rectangle with spin (rotate) animation bound to boolean property

steps.script: () => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="palette-element-rectangle"]'); const canvas = document.querySelector('[data-testid="designer-canvas-container"]'); const canvasRect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', JSON.stringify({type:'rectangle'})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragstart', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragover', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + 150, clientY: canvasRect.top + 150})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('drop', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + 150, clientY: canvasRect.top + 150})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragend', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); return true; }

steps.message: Add animation button should be visible

tests.name: TC005: Text with Blink animation
tests.description: Create text with blink (discrete opacity) animation

steps.script: () => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="palette-element-text"]'); const canvas = document.querySelector('[data-testid="designer-canvas-container"]'); const canvasRect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', JSON.stringify({type:'text'})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragstart', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragover', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + 200, clientY: canvasRect.top + 200})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('drop', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + 200, clientY: canvasRect.top + 200})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragend', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); return true; }

() => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="palette-element-polygon"]'); const canvas = document.querySelector('[data-testid="designer-canvas-container"]'); const canvasRect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', JSON.stringify({type:'polygon'})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragstart', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragover', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + 200, clientY: canvasRect.top + 200})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('drop', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + 200, clientY: canvasRect.top + 200})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragend', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); return true; }

tests.name: TC007: All primitives with multiple animations
tests.description: Create all primitive types and verify animation panel is available for each

steps.script: () => { const types = ['rectangle', 'ellipse', 'line', 'text', 'polygon', 'polyline']; const positions = [[100, 100], [250, 100], [400, 100], [100, 250], [250, 250], [400, 250]]; types.forEach((type, i) => { const el = document.querySelector(`[data-testid="palette-element-${type}"]`); if (!el) return; const canvas = document.querySelector('[data-testid="designer-canvas-container"]'); const canvasRect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', JSON.stringify({type})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragstart', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragover', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + positions[i][0], clientY: canvasRect.top + positions[i][1]})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('drop', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + positions[i][0], clientY: canvasRect.top + positions[i][1]})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragend', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); }); return true; }

tests.name: TC008: Verify Animation presets are available
tests.description: Check that animation presets (Spin, Pulse, Blink, etc.) are available in the picker

steps.script: () => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="palette-element-rectangle"]'); const canvas = document.querySelector('[data-testid="designer-canvas-container"]'); const canvasRect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', JSON.stringify({type:'rectangle'})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragstart', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragover', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + 200, clientY: canvasRect.top + 200})); canvas.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('drop', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt, clientX: canvasRect.left + 200, clientY: canvasRect.top + 200})); el.dispatchEvent(new DragEvent('dragend', {bubbles:true, cancelable:true, dataTransfer:dt})); return true; }

tests.name: TC009: Simulation panel toggle for animations
tests.description: Verify that the boolean property can be toggled in simulation to enable/disable animations

steps.message: Boolean property should appear in simulation panel

tests.name: TC010: Animation types coverage
tests.description: Verify all animation types are available: Attribute, Transform, Motion Path, Flow Particles
